projects.name: SudhiOS Portfolio
projects.description: A virtual desktop OS-themed developer portfolio built with React. Features include window management, terminal emulator, matrix rain effects, and multiple themes.

projects.name: DevConnect Platform
projects.description: A real-time developer collaboration and code sharing platform with live coding sessions, video calls, and integrated code review tools.

projects.name: CryptoTracker Pro
projects.description: Live cryptocurrency portfolio tracker with real-time price alerts, interactive charts, portfolio analytics, and market sentiment analysis.

projects.name: AI Code Reviewer
projects.description: Automated PR code review tool powered by GPT-4 and GitHub Actions. Provides intelligent code suggestions, security vulnerability detection, and best practice recommendations.

projects.name: E-Commerce Engine
projects.description: Scalable full-stack e-commerce platform with payment integration, inventory management, order tracking, and admin dashboard.

projects.name: Terminal Blog
projects.description: A developer blog with terminal-style UI and markdown support. Features syntax highlighting, RSS feed, and SEO optimization.

projects.name: TaskFlow Manager
projects.description: A Kanban-style project management tool with drag-and-drop interface, team collaboration, time tracking, and reporting.

projects.name: Weather Dashboard
projects.description: Beautiful weather dashboard with 7-day forecasts, interactive maps, severe weather alerts, and location-based notifications.
